raw_response:

  "communicative_function": "performative self-affirmation and boundary-setting declaration",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "emotional absorption or stabilization of others' states is possible and occurs",
    "one can occupy an identifiable 'role' of emotional surrogate",
    "'frequency' is a transferable entity that can be returned",
    "personal energetic 'field' exists and can be kept intact by intention"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within an energetic/psycho-spiritual framework; each line logically extends the prior by moving from recognition to action to maintenance",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "user accepts metaphorical or experiential framing of emotional boundaries, finds the language subjectively empowering, and applies it alongside evidence-based psychological skills",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "statements are interpreted as literal energetic mechanisms rather than psychological metaphors, or used to justify emotional disengagement without accountability"
}
